title: TraineeAnalytics
description: Per-trainee learning-curve metrics, computed deterministically from stored ScoreReports. The trainee id is an OPAQUE per-browser analytics key, NOT an identity or credential. This is the wire format for GET /api/analytics/{traineeId}. An unknown trainee yields a zeroed report (not a 404).

traineeId.description: Opaque per-browser learner id. Not an identity or credential.

totalEncounters.description: Count of completed (FEEDBACK-stage, scored) encounters for this trainee.

underTriageRate.description: Fraction of scored encounters with triageDirection == UNDER_TRIAGE. 0 when totalEncounters == 0. The headline safety metric.

overTriageRate.description: Fraction with triageDirection == OVER_TRIAGE. 0 when totalEncounters == 0.

correctRate.description: Fraction with triageDirection == CORRECT. 0 when totalEncounters == 0.

meanLevelsOffAbs.description: Mean of abs(esi.levelsOff) across scored encounters. 0 when totalEncounters == 0.

history.description: Per-encounter points in chronological order (by startedAt ascending), one per scored encounter.

esiAssigned.description: The trainee's ESI decision; null if none was recorded.

esiExpert.description: Expert reference ESI for the case.
